payload:
Work through HYPOTHESES.yml micro-scale experiments in priority order. Pick the lowest-priority-number open node with all deps satisfied. Skip any experiment requiring   
  GPU/RunPod. Focus on these CPU experiments first:                                                                                                                                          
  1. exp_content_aware_routing (P2) - routing accuracy comparison
  2. exp_premerge_vs_dynamic_quality (P3) - determines if routing is even... [truncated, 2052 chars total]

exp_content_aware_routing KILLED (K1+K3). Best routing accuracy 26.5% < 60% threshold. NTP quality identical across all strategies (experts don't specialize at d=64). Cluster-level routing trivially solvable (96%). Integrated gram_schmidt_composition as proven (PROCEED review). Next eligible: exp_premerge_vs_dynamic_quality or exp_answer_conditioned_scoring (both P3, CPU-ok).

Two parallel experiments completed. (1) exp_premerge_vs_dynamic_quality KILLED K2: dynamic routing provides no advantage over pre-merge at N<20 (max gap +0.06%), BUT results vacuous due to 0% specialization at d=64. Methodology validated for macro retest. (2) exp_answer_conditioned_scoring SURVIVES: answer-only PPL Pearson r=0.811+/-0.16 vs full-seq r=-0.31. Fixes PPL metric for evolution shadow scoring. Both need adversarial review.

Two experiments reviewed: exp_answer_conditioned_scoring PROCEED (proven, r=0.811 answer-only PPL), exp_premerge_vs_dynamic_quality PROCEED-as-killed (vacuous at micro, methodology validated). consecutive_kills reset to 0.

Two parallel experiments completed: (1) exp_delta_rank_scaling WEAK_KILL - Shannon ratio >0.5 at d=128/256 (K1 killed) but trend clearly decreasing (power law d^-0.15, R2=0.929), practical r_95 extrapolates to 12% at d=4096 (feasible). (2) exp_oae_vs_lora_soups PROVEN - OAE and LoRA Soups complementary not competing, OAE adds 5 distinct advantages (structural orthogonality, zero-cost composition, unbounded N, evolutionary lifecycle, instant expert mgmt).

oae_vs_lora_soups PROCEED (integrated, 2 new nodes: exp_cat_weight_convergence P3, exp_lora_flow_comparison P4). delta_rank_scaling REVISE (5 fixes: convergence control, exclude embeddings, CI on exponent, accept K1 kill, multi-checkpoint rho).

exp_collision_scaling SUPPORTED: collision rate decreases with N (beta=-0.575). At N=20 only 1.23% collide (24x below kill). exp_delta_rank_scaling v2 COMPLETE: all 5 review fixes applied, convergence confound eliminated, K1 kill accepted.
